## Problem

What are you trying to do that NavigationKit doesn't support well today?

## Proposed solution

What API or behavior would solve it? A short code sketch helps:

```swift
navigator.someNewAPI(...)
```

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about, including workarounds you're using today.
